name: Two Minute Velvet Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease an 8-inch x 8-inch pan.
2. Microwave the chocolate and condensed milk, uncovered, in a 2-quart bowl on high for 2 minutes.
3. Stir until smooth.
4. Add sugar and vanilla; stir again to combine.
5. Mix in chopped nuts until well blended.
6. Pour mixture into prepared pan and spread evenly.
7. Chill until firm.
